title: Assert: iterateAndNext node has no back

features.name: recursive module instantiation in generate block
features.description: Code should include a module that recursively instantiates itself within a generate block, where recursion termination is controlled by a parameter condition

features.name: parameterized module instantiation with base case
features.description: Code should include a parameterized module that instantiates another module with computed parameter values based on the parent parameter

features.name: generate block with multiple recursive instances
features.description: Code should include a generate block that creates multiple recursive module instances with different computed parameter values
